title: Forge context-bundle frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a .claude/bundles/*.md context bundle. Derived from the REQUIRED_KEYS and invariants (B-1..B-4) enforced by bundle-lint. The 16 required keys must be present; invariants is a non-empty subset of 1..10; human_gate is a boolean. Pointer resolution on disk (B-2) is checked by the linter, not expressible here.

status.description: Lifecycle status, e.g. active, draft, archived.

work_type.description: The recurring class of slice this bundle serves. Tenancy/RLS, core write-path, and v1->v2 migration work-types require human_gate: true.

invariants.description: Non-empty subset of the project's 10 invariants, referenced by integer (1..10).

adrs.description: Referenced ADRs (pointers only; content stays COLD).

spec_sections.description: Referenced spec files and the relevant sections within them.

br_ids.description: Business-rule IDs this bundle implements; each must exist in the BR catalog.

modules.description: The code modules this bundle touches.

skill.description: Primary harness skill (path under .claude/) that drives this work.

dod_ref.description: Definition-of-Done reference, file path optionally followed by #anchor.

invisible_20.description: The invisible-20% defense: the non-obvious rules that must hold but are easy to miss.

human_gate.description: Whether this slice requires a human gate. Must be true for tenancy/RLS, core write-path, and v1->v2 migration work-types.

backlog_slices.description: Optional: backlog slice(s) this bundle serves.

release_blocking_gates.description: Optional: gates that block release if red.
